texto: It is not wise to think of people as either friends or enemies as if you were the center of the universe
autor: many are not aware of your existance!
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a many are not aware of your existance!: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “It is not wise to think of people as either friends or enemies as if you were the center of the u…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, salman-al-odah, think pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de termino e reflexao.
